source: BAT-761 v2 schema + BAT-769 perplexity + BAT-768+766 Tier 1 extras (stablecrypto + same-provider)

entries.name: Wolfram Alpha
entries.summary: Computational intelligence — math, science, factual lookups via the Wolfram knowledge engine.

entries.name: Tripadvisor Nearby Search
entries.summary: Search nearby travel locations — hotels, restaurants, attractions — by latitude/longitude.

entries.name: 2Captcha
intents: solve captcha on my own site
accessibility captcha helper for users with disabilities
captcha during testing of a site I own or have operator permission to automate
entries.summary: Submit a CAPTCHA for solving — supports recaptcha, hcaptcha, image. Authorized use only: (1) accessibility assistance for users with disabilities completing a CAPTCHA on a site they're legitimately using, or (2) automated testing of a site the user OWNS or has direct site-operator permission to automate. The user's own consent does NOT make solving a CAPTCHA on a third-party site authorized — the SITE OPERATOR's consent is what matters. NOT for defeating anti-abuse controls.

entries.name: Reducto Document Parser
entries.summary: Parse documents (PDF, images) into structured data via Reducto's AI extraction.

entries.name: Rentcast Markets
entries.summary: US rental market data — average rent, market trends, property statistics by zip/city.

entries.name: Crushrewards Shopper
entries.summary: Find best price across major US retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Costco, Home Depot, etc.).

entries.name: StableCrypto New Pools
entries.summary: Get new on-chain pools across DEXes via the CoinGecko-onchain proxy. Returns recently-deployed token pairs — NOT generic price lookups.

entries.name: Purch Marketplace Search
entries.summary: Search the Purch marketplace catalog (general product/listing search).

entries.name: Textbelt SMS
entries.summary: Send a real SMS to a phone number (E.164 format). Authorized-use only: the user's own phone, or a recipient who has clearly consented. NOT for bulk, marketing-without-opt-in, phishing, or impersonation. POST always confirms before paying.

entries.name: Perplexity Web Search
entries.summary: Perplexity web search — synthesized answer with citations ($0.01/call). Use for "explain X" or "what does the community think about Y" queries where web_search would just return raw results. Same cost as /v1/agent ($0.01) but simpler request shape; pick the agent endpoint when the task needs multi-step reasoning or tool use.

entries.name: Perplexity Agent (Deep Reasoning)
entries.summary: Perplexity agent endpoint — multi-step reasoning with tool use, deeper than basic search. Use when the user wants the agent to research a topic across multiple sources and synthesize. $0.01.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Price
entries.summary: Current spot price for any CoinGecko-tracked coin. Use for "what is the price of X" queries. $0.01 per call.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Markets (top coins)
entries.summary: List of coins by market cap with price/volume/24h-change. Use for "top coins by market cap" / "biggest cryptocurrencies" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Price Chart
entries.summary: Historical price chart data for a coin over a time range. Use for "price chart of X" / "how has X performed" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko OHLC Candles
entries.summary: Open-high-low-close candle data for a coin. Use for technical analysis / candlestick chart queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Top Movers
entries.summary: Top gainers and losers in the last 24h. Use for "what is pumping" / "biggest gains today" / "biggest losers today" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Trending Coins
entries.summary: Top-searched coins on CoinGecko in the last 24h. Use for "what is trending" / "what is everyone looking at" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Categories
entries.summary: List of CoinGecko categories (e.g. DeFi, Layer-1, Memes) with market cap data. Use for "what categories are hot" / "Layer-1 comparison" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Onchain Pool Detail
entries.summary: On-chain DEX pool data for a specific pool (price, volume, TVL, recent trades). Use for "details on pool X" / "is this Raydium pool legit" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto CoinGecko Trending On-chain Pools
entries.summary: Trending DEX pools across chains (most-traded recent pools). Use for "trending pools" / "what new pool should I watch" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Protocols (TVL list)
entries.summary: Full DeFi protocol list with TVL, 1d/7d change, chain breakdown. Use for "top DeFi protocols" / "protocols on Solana" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Single Protocol
entries.summary: TVL + breakdown for ONE named DeFi protocol (e.g. Raydium, Marinade). Use when user asks about a specific protocol.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Chains (TVL by chain)
entries.summary: TVL totals per blockchain (Solana, Ethereum, Base, etc.). Use for "which chain has most TVL" / "chain comparison" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Single Chain TVL
entries.summary: Detailed TVL history for ONE chain. Use for "Solana TVL history" / "how has chain X TVL changed" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Yields Pools
entries.summary: Yield farming pools across DeFi protocols with APY/TVL/IL risk. Use for "best yield farming" / "highest APY" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Perps Yields
entries.summary: Funding-rate yields on perp protocols. Use for "perps funding rates" / "delta-neutral farming" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Stablecoins
entries.summary: Stablecoin market caps + chain distribution + peg health. Use for "stablecoin market cap" / "is USDC depegging" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama DEX Overview
entries.summary: Aggregated DEX volume across chains (24h, 7d, 30d). Use for "DEX volume" / "Solana DEX volume" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Fees Overview
entries.summary: Protocol fees + revenue across DeFi. Use for "which protocols make most fees" / "fee revenue" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Derivatives Overview
entries.summary: Derivatives volume across perp DEXes and centralized derivatives venues. Use for "perp volume" / "derivatives market" queries.

entries.name: StableCrypto DeFiLlama Historical Prices
entries.summary: Historical price for one or more coins at a specific timestamp. Use for "what was the price of X on date Y" / backtesting queries.

entries.name: Wolfram Alpha (v2 Query)
entries.summary: Wolfram v2 Query API — structured JSON output (pods/subpods) for advanced computations. More detail than v1/result (which returns plain text). Use when the user wants structured data or step-by-step solutions.

entries.name: Rentcast Property Value (AVM)
entries.summary: Automated Valuation Model: estimated current sale value for a US property by address. Use for "what is this property worth" / Zillow-Zestimate-style queries.

entries.name: Rentcast Property Lookup
entries.summary: Property record (size, beds, baths, year built, tax records) for a US address. Use for "tell me about this property" / property research queries.

entries.name: Rentcast Sale Listings
entries.summary: Active for-sale listings in a US market (filtered by city/zip/price/beds). Use for "homes for sale in X" queries.

entries.name: Rentcast Long-term Rental Listings
entries.summary: Active long-term rental listings in a US market. Use for "rentals in X" / "apartments for rent" queries.

entries.name: Tripadvisor Location Search
entries.summary: Search Tripadvisor by query string (NOT geo). Use when user gives a place name ("La Tartine in Paris") rather than coordinates. For coord-based search use the nearby_search entry.

entries.name: Tripadvisor Location Details
entries.summary: Full details for a specific Tripadvisor location ID (hours, photos count, rating, address). Use after a search/nearby_search returns a location ID.

entries.name: Tripadvisor Location Reviews
entries.summary: Recent reviews for a specific Tripadvisor location. Use to surface what visitors say about a place.

entries.name: Tripadvisor Location Photos
entries.summary: Photo URLs for a specific Tripadvisor location. Returns links; the agent surfaces URLs to the user (cannot embed images directly).

entries.name: Reducto Document Parser (parse mode)
entries.summary: Lower-cost parse mode — extracts text + structure from PDFs/images. Use when user wants raw OCR/text without Reducto extract mode's AI-extraction layer. Complements existing /extract entry.

entries.name: Crushrewards Inflation Index
entries.summary: Live US consumer-price inflation index derived from retail-price scraping. Use for "is X getting more expensive" / "current US inflation rate" queries.

entries.name: Crushrewards Price History
entries.summary: Historical price chart for a specific product across US retailers. Use for "has X gone up in price" / "is this a good deal" queries.

entries.name: Crushrewards Deal Finder
entries.summary: Active deals/discounts on a product across major US retailers. Use for "deals on X" / "best discounts right now" queries.
